layout_notes: Central east-west corridor 3000 mm wide runs full length, separating north and south rows of rooms.
North row (7 cells): stairwell-W, classroom-1, classroom-2, classroom-3, classroom-4, classroom-5, stairwell-E.
South row (8 cells): classroom-6, classroom-7, mens-toilet, lobby, womens-toilet, classroom-8, classroom-9, classroom-10.
Lobby positioned at centre of south facade, aligned with main entrance double-leaf door.
Toilets flank the lobby; each has a small high-sill window on south facade.
Classrooms each have two large windows on their outer facade (north for north row, south for south row).
Corridor has horizontal band of windows on short ends and above lobby entrance.
Stairwells at east and west ends of the north row, each with door to corridor and internal railings.
All structural walls are load-bearing brick, 200 mm thick; no interior columns.
One ground-floor concrete slab and one flat concrete roof slab, both 200 mm thick.
assumptions: Total door count taken as 15 (10 classroom doors + 2 stair doors + 2 toilet doors + 1 lobby main entrance), though user note says 'about 14'.
Window count set to 22 as stated; calculated from program yields 25 (20 classroom + 3 corridor + 2 toilet), architect will adjust.
Number of walls derived from 4 external walls + 2 continuous corridor walls + 13 internal cross walls (6 north row, 7 south row).
External wall thicknesses included in footprint dimensions; internal partitions also 200 mm brick.
Stairwells contain no additional internal walls; railings modelled as two objects (one per stair).
Roof is a single flat slab covering the entire footprint; accounted as 1 roof object.
Floor slab and roof slab counted as two separate slab objects.
Room dimensions are approximate; architect may fine-tune to fit exact footprint and wall thicknesses.
